name: FREEZE FLOW VR
summary: Freeze Flow is an immersive VR survival game developed in Unity that challenges players to stay alive against waves of intelligent enemies. Using movement, strategy, and quick reactions, players must avoid attacks, defeat enemies, and survive as long as possible. The game features adaptive enemy waves, a health and score system, and a dynamic VR environment, creating an engaging and intense survival experience designed to demonstrate interactive gameplay and real-time VR mechanics.
